entities.name: LD-TYPE
entities.context: V's content type classification tag system for categorizing work (e.g., Internal Discussion)

entities.name: GPT-PHASE
entities.context: V's workflow phase classification system tracking where work is in lifecycle

entities.name: Internal Discussion
entities.context: A content type category indicating internal-facing content

entities.name: Development
entities.context: A workflow phase indicating active artifact generation

entities.name: Standard
entities.context: A priority level indicating routine documentation work

entities.name: V-OS Tags
entities.context: V's tagging system for classifying and routing work

relationships.context: LD-TYPE is a tag dimension within V-OS Tags system
GPT-PHASE is a tag dimension within V-OS Tags system
A-LEVEL is a tag dimension within V-OS Tags system
Internal Discussion is a value within the LD-TYPE classification
Development is a value within the GPT-PHASE classification
Standard is a value within the A-LEVEL classification
